seo.title: Azure Marketplace consulting - Publish, sell, co-sell | SSW
seo.description: Turn your software into an Azure Marketplace business. SSW publishes transactable offers, gets you co-sell ready, and unlocks committed Azure spend.

images.alt: Azure Marketplace consulting - Publish and sell your app

blocks.heading: Turn your software into an **Azure Marketplace business.**
blocks.description: Reach Azure's customer base, transact through Microsoft, and co-sell at scale. We design, publish, and optimise your Marketplace offer end to end.

features.heading: Reach Azure's customer base
features.description: Get in front of organisations already running on Azure, who can pay with their committed Azure spend (MACC).

features.heading: Microsoft sells and bills
features.description: Transactable offers route invoicing through Microsoft, and Co-Sell Ready status puts Microsoft sellers behind your product.

mediaConfiguration.altText: SSW Solution Architect helping a software vendor publish an Azure Marketplace offer

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Newcastle by
Stop losing deals to **data residency and compliance.**
blocks.description: Traditional SaaS asks enterprise customers to hand their data to your environment. Many regulated buyers can't. With an Azure Application offer on the Azure Marketplace, your whole app deploys into the customer's Azure tenant — they keep full ownership of data and infrastructure, and Microsoft handles billing through Partner Center.

features.heading: Deploy into the customer's tenant
features.description: Your app runs in their Azure subscription, no data leaves their environment.

features.heading: Microsoft handles billing
features.description: Monetize through Partner Center while you focus on building great software.

cards.heading: Azure Consulting
cards.description: Landing zones, migration, modern apps, DevOps, security, and FinOps for your Azure estate.

cards.heading: Artificial Intelligence
cards.description: Build AI-powered products, like SSW's Eagle Eye, ready to ship to enterprise customers.

cards.heading: DevOps
cards.description: CI/CD pipelines and automation to package and ship your marketplace offer reliably.

blocks.heading: Talk to us about getting on the Azure Marketplace
blocks.description: Connect with our Account Managers to discuss how we can help.
